title: phegopteris rotundata
intro: Phegopteris rotundata, also known as the rounded-leaved fern or round-leaf lady fern, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. The plant is rich in medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to reduce inflammation and prevent the formation of blood clots. The health benefits of Phegopteris rotundata include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve circulation, and reduce the risk of heart disease. Phegopteris rotundata can be prepared as a tea or infusion, as well as a tincture or decoction, to harness its medicinal properties.
